requirement_topic.en: OCPP Interoperability and IEC 61000 EMC Evidence

summary.en: Networked public chargers in Mauritius should be specified with back-office interoperability, remote monitoring, fault reporting, access control, metering data, and load-management functions suitable for the charge-point operator and utility coordination. OCPP is the common international protocol for charge-point back-office integration. EMC and power-quality evidence should be prepared against IEC 61000-family requirements, with harmonic, flicker, immunity, surge, and conducted/radiated emissions evidence matched to the installation environment and CEB project requirements.
summary.zh: 毛里求斯联网公共充电桩应规定后台互操作、远程监控、故障报告、访问控制、计量数据和负载管理功能，以适配充电点运营商和公用事业协调。OCPP是充电点后台集成的通用国际协议。EMC和电能质量证据应按IEC 61000系列要求准备，并使谐波、闪变、抗扰度、浪涌、传导/辐射发射证据与安装环境和CEB项目要求相匹配。
summary.zht: 模里西斯聯網公共充電樁應規定後台互操作、遠程監控、故障報告、訪問控制、計量數據和負載管理功能，以適配充電點運營商和公用事業協調。OCPP是充電點後台集成的通用國際協議。EMC和電能質量證據應按IEC 61000系列要求準備，並使諧波、閃變、抗擾度、浪湧、傳導/輻射發射證據與安裝環境和CEB項目要求相匹配。

standards_or_laws: OCPP (Open Charge Point Protocol) — back-office communication for networked chargers
CEB project power-quality and grid-connection requirements
URA utility regulatory oversight where applicable

summary.en: China DC fast chargers commonly use GB/T 27930-2023 CAN communication between the off-board charger and the vehicle battery management system. China operators may also use proprietary or OCPP-like back-office protocols, but GB/T 27930 is not OCPP and does not establish CCS2 or international back-office interoperability. China EMC reports may need clause mapping to IEC 61000 editions accepted by the Mauritius project.
summary.zh: 中国直流快充通常采用GB/T 27930-2023 CAN通信，用于非车载充电机与车辆电池管理系统之间。中国运营商也可能使用私有或类似OCPP的后台协议，但GB/T 27930不是OCPP，也不能证明CCS2或国际后台互操作。中国EMC报告可能需要逐条映射到毛里求斯项目接受的IEC 61000版本。
summary.zht: 中國直流快充通常採用GB/T 27930-2023 CAN通訊，用於非車載充電機與車輛電池管理系統之間。中國運營商也可能使用私有或類似OCPP的後台協議，但GB/T 27930不是OCPP，也不能證明CCS2或國際後台互操作。中國EMC報告可能需要逐條映射到模里西斯項目接受的IEC 61000版本。

gap.en: Exporters should confirm the OCPP version, security profile, SIM or network requirements, API test plan, remote diagnostics, metering data format, and CPO acceptance tests. For EMC, provide IEC 61000-family test reports and a site-level harmonic/load-management review for CEB. GB/T 27930-only DC communication and China-only EMC reports are not enough for Mauritius networked public charger activation.
gap.zh: 出口商应确认OCPP版本、安全配置、SIM或网络要求、API测试计划、远程诊断、计量数据格式和充电点运营商验收测试。EMC方面，应提供IEC 61000系列测试报告，并为CEB准备站点级谐波/负载管理审查。仅有GB/T 27930直流通信和中国EMC报告，不足以支持毛里求斯联网公共充电桩激活。
gap.zht: 出口商應確認OCPP版本、安全配置、SIM或網絡要求、API測試計劃、遠程診斷、計量數據格式和充電點運營商驗收測試。EMC方面，應提供IEC 61000系列測試報告，並為CEB準備站點級諧波/負載管理審查。僅有GB/T 27930直流通訊和中國EMC報告，不足以支持模里西斯聯網公共充電樁激活。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where required by the charge-point operator, CEB project specification, tender, or networked public charging platform; IEC 61000 EMC evidence is a practical acceptance requirement for grid-connected equipment
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 27930 is a China domestic DC vehicle-charger communication protocol and is not an OCPP back-office substitute

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Mauritius networked public charging projects should treat OCPP integration and IEC 61000 EMC evidence as separate workstreams. GB/T 27930 vehicle communication does not prove back-office interoperability or CCS2 readiness.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 毛里求斯联网公共充电项目应将OCPP集成和IEC 61000 EMC证据作为两个独立工作流处理。GB/T 27930车辆通信不能证明后台互操作或CCS2就绪。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 模里西斯聯網公共充電項目應將OCPP集成和IEC 61000 EMC證據作為兩個獨立工作流處理。GB/T 27930車輛通訊不能證明後台互操作或CCS2就緒。
